parameters.$filter: HRRequestSentAt ne null and ResponseReceivedAt eq null

parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello @{items('Apply_to_each')?['EmployerName']},

This is a reminder that we have sent you a previous employment verification request for our candidate @{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']}.

We kindly request your assistance to complete the form as soon as possible using the link below:

@{outputs('FinalVerificationLink')}

Company stamp document for Request ID @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}:
Open Company Stamp - @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}.docx

Thank you.

Thanks & Regards,
D L Reources Pte Ltd

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: 2nd Reminder: Employment Verification Request from D L Resources
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Hello @{items('Apply_to_each')?['EmployerName']},


This is a second reminder to complete the employment verification for @{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']}. @{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']} has provied us your contact to conduct this background check.

Kindly access the link below and fill in the form as soon as possible:
@{outputs('FinalVerificationLink')}

Company stamp document for Request ID @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}:
Open Company Stamp - @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}.docx

Thanks & Regards,
D L Resources Pte Ltd

parameters.body/messageBody:
PEV Checks Cleared


Candidate ID : @{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateID']}

Candidate Name : @{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']}

Employer : @{items('Apply_to_each')?['EmployerName']}

Employer HR Email : @{items('Apply_to_each')?['EmployerHR_Email']}

Candidate Folder : @{concat('https://dlresourcespl88.sharepoint.com/sites/DLRRecruitmentOps570/PEV%20Records/Candidate%20Files/',encodeUriComponent(string(items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateID'])),'/') }


One day has passed since Reminder 2 was sent and no employer response was received. TAC form to be sent.

Compose_Final_Reminder_Email_Html.inputs:
This is a final reminder for the background check regarding:@{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']}.


@{items('Apply_to_each')?['CandidateItemID_x003a__x0020_Ful/Value']} has authorise us to do a background check. He/She has provided us your contact. We kindly ask that you help us to fill in the following form :

@{outputs('FinalVerificationLink')}


Company stamp document for Request ID @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}:
Open Company Stamp - @{items('Apply_to_each')?['RequestID']}.docx
